commit_scope: Add a preview-only public kernel-image proposal interface. The public substrate route accepts BML source, derives a candidate KERNEL-CORE-IMAGE summary, returns source/image hashes, count deltas, proof trace, and a trust envelope, and carries apply intent without mutating production.

commands: cd api && python3 -m ruff check app/routers/substrate.py tests/test_substrate_kernel_image_proposals.py
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.notes: Dedicated worktree prompt gate passed on codex/kernel-image-proposal-20260609. Initial wellness passed local maps, source maps, symbol resolution, locale parity, Form ontology, and Form blueprint checks; public endpoint probes reported transient 404s during the read but the command exited successfully and named kernel-native API promotion as the growth edge. The plain rebase command failed because task changes were intentionally unstaged; the branch was then cleanly rebased with --autostash on the named codex branch. Focused API tests passed 3/3. Sibling Form validation returned 11111 with 1 ok, 0 divergent. Ruff, spec quality, generated-index check, diff check, followthrough guard, local PR guard, and post-edit wellness passed. Local PR guard reported ready_for_push=True and local_preflight=pass. Post-edit wellness reported deploy aligned at 7bd233cc and kernel-native API breathing.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy attempted before PR review and merge.

phase_gate.notes: Focused proof, route tests, lint, spec validation, generated-index check, diff check, evidence validation, rebase freshness via --autostash repair, local PR guard, followthrough guard, and wellness pass. Local proof is ready_for_push=True, but commit, push, PR, remote CI, merge, and deploy verification remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The public interface can now receive BML kernel-core source and return an observable candidate kernel image proposal without production mutation.
test_flows: Canonical kernel-core BML source returns accepted-preview with source hash equal to canonical source hash, zero count deltas, candidate KERNEL-CORE-IMAGE counts 8/15/6, image hash, trust envelope, and mutation_performed=false.
requested_action=apply is carried in the response but mutation.allowed=false and mutation.performed=false.
Unproven source returns rejected-preview with failed proof trace and no candidate image.
Form sibling proof returns 11111 for image naming, proof preview acceptance, mutation refusal, carried residual, and source/image hash exposure.

evidence_refs: api/app/routers/substrate.py defines KernelImageProposalRequest, KernelImageProposalOut, and propose_kernel_image.
api/tests/test_substrate_kernel_image_proposals.py proves accepted canonical source, apply-intent refusal, and rejected unproven source.
form/form-stdlib/kernel-image-proposal.fk defines the preview-only trust envelope and mutation gate in Form.
Focused validation: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/kernel-image-proposal.fk form-stdlib/tests/kernel-image-proposal-band.fk -> 11111; 1 ok, 0 divergent.
Focused validation: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_substrate_kernel_image_proposals.py -> 3 passed.
Lint: cd api && python3 -m ruff check app/routers/substrate.py tests/test_substrate_kernel_image_proposals.py -> All checks passed.
Local guard: python3 scripts/worktree_pr_guard.py --mode local --base-ref origin/main -> ready_for_push=True; local_preflight=pass.
